title: Watch WordCamp Asia 2026 Live
content:
WordCamp Asia 2026 in Mumbai is live streamed — free for everyone. Starting today at 6:25 am!

Three days, three streams: Foundation, Growth and Enterprise. Highlights: Fireside Chat with Mary Hubbard and closing keynote by Matt Mullenweg.

  • Day 1 – Contributor Day: Release Squad members share how WordPress releases are made.
  • Days 2 & 3 – Conference: Talks on AI, Developer Experience, Enterprise and Community.
  • Matt Mullenweg: Closing keynote on Day 3.
